description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Add three different red wines, each priced under $25 and rated at least 4.0 stars, to your cart so that their combined wine subtotal stays under $70, then go to the cart page.

tasks.instruction: Find a white wine between $15 and $30 that is recommended for seafood, has at least 4.0 stars, and add one bottle of the highest-rated matching option to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Join a mid-tier wine club plan that costs under $80 per month using guest checkout (without creating a password-based account) and proceed to the order review page.

tasks.instruction: Purchase a digital (email-delivered) gift card with a value of at least $100, add one to your cart, and proceed from the cart to the first checkout page.

tasks.instruction: Find a wine with at least two vintages available under $50, compare their ratings, and add two bottles of the highest-rated vintage to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Build a mixed selection of 6 wines marked as organic or sustainably produced—3 reds, 2 whites, and 1 rosé—each priced between $15 and $40, ensure the wine subtotal is at least $150 to qualify for free shipping, select any available free shipping option, and proceed to the first checkout step.

tasks.instruction: Locate a dessert wine in 375ml (half-bottle) size priced under $60 with a critic score of at least 90 points and add it to your wishlist or favorites.

tasks.instruction: Open the winery’s story or About page, scroll through the content, then use the newsletter signup form in the footer to subscribe with your first name and email address.
